note: Every art/audio surface is a stable-ID SLOT (GDD §10a). Reused fantasy assets (icons/portraits/UI/fonts) are bound to their res:// files with provenance; section illustration PLATES are bound to clearly-labelled veritas-gamebook PLACEHOLDER assets (real PNGs, not placeholder UI) that the Studio replaces with generated plates in Phase 5 — no code edits. Scene code resolves slots ONLY through AssetBinder by id.

source.summary: a sin-eater set down at a fog-drowned verge-stone where the road dissolves into black bog; a coach turning back

source.summary: Ferrant Coinwright's lantern-lit stall: rope, torches, dried fish, a physician's-cross bottle, and a saint-named sword wrapped in oilcloth
a leg swallowed to the thigh in black fen; pale robed faceless shapes standing in the water, each writing a name in a little book
a stair descending into the drowned Cathedra of Accounts, water rising, ledger-script whispering in the dark, a pale shape waiting below
Isolde the Unpaid, a girl of twelve in a decade-old funeral shift, grey ledger-script crawling over half her skin, too still, sorrowful not gory
the Reckoner (Ambrose Vael), a stooped grieving High Ledgerkeeper in a tag-hung robe with a hanging brass balance, at a great ledger; tragic not demonic
